recommendations.title: Batman: Gotham by Gaslight
recommendations.overview: In an alternative Victorian Age Gotham City, Batman begins his war on crime while he investigates a new series of murders by Jack the Ripper.

recommendations.title: Batman and Harley Quinn
recommendations.overview: Batman and Nightwing are forced to team with the Joker's sometimes-girlfriend Harley Quinn to stop a global threat brought about by Poison Ivy and Jason Woodrue, the Floronic Man.

recommendations.title: Batman: Year One
recommendations.overview: A wealthy playboy named Bruce Wayne and a Chicago cop named Jim Gordon both return to Gotham City where their lives unexpectedly intersect.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Doom That Came to Gotham
recommendations.overview: Explorer Bruce Wayne accidentally unleashes an ancient evil, and returns to Gotham after being away for two decades. There, Batman battles Lovecraftian supernatural forces and encounters allies and enemies such as Green Arrow, Ra's al Ghul, Mr. Freez

recommendations.title: Batman: Strange Days
recommendations.overview: A lost tale from Batman's past, the Dark Knight tracks a strange giant to the mysterious lair of Hugo Strange.

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Death
recommendations.overview: Vincent, an artist with unresolved inner demons, meets a mysterious girl who helps him come to terms with his creative legacy… and eventual death.

recommendations.title: Justice League vs. Teen Titans
recommendations.overview: Robin is sent by Batman to work with the Teen Titans after his volatile behavior botches up a Justice League mission. The Titans must then step up to face Trigon after he possesses the League and threatens to conquer the world.

recommendations.title: Batman: Soul of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Bruce Wayne faces a deadly menace from his past, with the help of three former classmates: world-renowned martial artists Richard Dragon, Ben Turner and Lady Shiva.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Gods and Monsters
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In an alternate universe, very different versions of DC's Trinity fight against the government after they are framed for an embassy bombing.

recommendations.title: Superman: Red Son
recommendations.overview: Set in the thick of the Cold War, Red Son introduces us to a Superman who landed in the USSR during the 1950s and grows up to become a Soviet symbol that fights for the preservation of Stalin’s brand of communism.
